titleStmt.title: SII 25.103: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 103. (A.R. No. 103 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The record may be assigned on palaeographical grounds to c. 12th century. It is dated in the year 2 opposite to 1 Mithuna 5, Sunday corresponding to 1165 A.D., May 30.

It records that the mūlaparushai-mahāsabhai of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu after purchasing the tax paying lands of god Kailāsamuḍaiya-nāyanār, declared it as tax-free dēvadāṉa and received in lieu of 30 śōḻiya-naṟ-paḻaṅ-kāśu which the sabhai wanted to spend at the place where the king (perumāḷ) is staying. The above declaration is said to take effect from the year opposite the 3rd year of the king (i.e., the 4th year).

In a record from Kōḍaganallūr (No. 205 of 1932-33) the king is stated to have stayed at Kuruvittuṟai in the month of November 1165 A.D. It does not refer to the place where he was camping. Obviously, the king must have arrived at Śōḻakulāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, the same as Kuruvittuṟai about 6 months prior to the date of Kōḍaganallūr record. He is later known to have moved to the city of Madurai, 30 miles to the east of Kuruvittuṟai sometime before July 1166 A.D. (vide No. 101 discussed above) which was visited by the mahāsabhai of Tirupputtūr for paying respects to the said king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulacekaratevaṟkku yāṇṭu 2 Āvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mituṉa nā
yiṟṟu Añcāntiyati peṟṟa tirunāyiṟṟukkiḻamai nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiruppu
ttūr mulaparuṣai mahāsabhaiyom nammun śrī kayilāsa muṭaiya nāyaṉārkuṭi nilattil vilai koṇṭu Iṟai
Iṟuttu varukiṟa Ivvūr vaṭavāy vayal mutteruvāyk kālkkiḻvāy vayal comāccivayakkal mu
ṟṟulum van=tatū nilam muṟṟum narikkorai Icceyk kuṟucciyāl van=tatū nilamuṟṟum paḻantevatāṉappaṭi
Itaṉ Etirāmāṇṭu mutal menokki cantrādityavaṟ Iṟaiviḻa viṭṭukkuṭuttu perumāḷ Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntaṭattu va
ra viṉiyokattukku koṇ coḻiya naṟppaḻaṅkācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatum samvatsaravāri m
kuṭuppiccu Iccomācci vayakkalālvan=tatū nilam muṟṟum kuṟucciyālavantatū nilam muṟṟum paḻan
tevatāṉappaṭi Iṟaiviḻa viṭṭukkuṭuttu Ippaṭik kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom śrīkayilā
sa muṭaiya nāyanārkku mulaparuṣai mahāsabhaiyomitu panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 25.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
